title: Default Configuration
description: Configure default values for project phases. These values will be used as defaults when creating new clients.
generalPreferencesDescription: Configure general preferences that affect how data is displayed in the application.
preferredUnitDescription: Select the default unit of measure for displaying hours and effort in projects.
resetConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to reset to system defaults? This will overwrite your custom configuration.
currentlyUsingSystemDefaults: You are currently using system default values.
currentlyUsingCustomDefaults: You are using a custom configuration.
timelineDescription: Drag the bars to adjust the time ranges of the phases. Use the side grips to resize.
distributionSumError: The sum of distributions for {{phase}} must be 100%
e2eSumError: The sum of E2E percentages (excluding contingency) must be 100% (currently: {{current}}%)
e2eByPhaseDescription: Configure the E2E percentage for each phase. The sum (excluding contingency) must be 100%.
sumMustBe100: The sum must be exactly 100% (contingency is separate)
skillDistributionDescription: Configure the percentage distribution of skills for each phase. Each row must sum to 100%.
